subcodes.first_line: O Desire! The Desire of the world came, yet they recognized Him not; the Beloved of all worlds appeared, yet they turned away from Him, the Speaker [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مراد مراد عالم آمد و نشناختند محبوب عالمیان آمد از او اعراض نمودند مکلم
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
